## What makes this model worth adding?

<!-- One or two sentences. What's unique? What use case? -->

## Open-source verification

I confirm:

- [ ] The model weights are freely downloadable (no application form, manual approval, or paywall)
- [ ] The license is OSI-approved OR a permissive weights license (Apache-2.0, MIT, BSD, MPL, CC-BY, CC-BY-SA, OpenRAIL, or similar). Non-commercial licenses are accepted only if the weights themselves are public.
- [ ] This is NOT a wrapper around a closed-source API (ElevenLabs, OpenAI TTS, etc.)
- [ ] I am the model author OR I have verified the above by reading the model's repo

## Samples

- [ ] I added 3 sample files per voice in `public/samples/<model-id>/<voice-id>/`
- [ ] Each sample contains the **exact** script text from `data/scripts.json` — not paraphrased
- [ ] Samples are the raw model output — no manual editing, normalization, or trimming
- [ ] How I generated them: <!-- e.g. local install, Replicate, Modal, author's demo -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] `data/models.json` entry matches the model card on the source repo
